name: Stickman Run Parkour
description: Welcome to Stickman Run, A new Stickman running parkour Game . you'll face challenging levels filled with devious traps once more. Are you ready to take command of this brave stickman and show his acrobatic abilities while earning various achievements and gems? Best of luck!
instructions: A and D to move left and right use W to jump and climb use S and D or A to scroll you can also use arrows
tags: Action, Adventure, Best, Hot, jump, Jumping, run, running, Stickman
